Knight Fitness Presents

You're Invited to the

6WC Red Carpet

Dress to Impress

Awards · Celebrations · Community
◆

Hey Team,

You're invited to our 6WC Red Carpet Event — a special night to celebrate your hard work, your achievements, and the community you've been part of throughout the challenge.

As a current participant, your spot is already secured — there's nothing you need to do. Just save the date and get ready to celebrate.

Saturday

18
July
2026

5:00PM – 10:00PM

Venue

The Hills Room West · Eatons Hill Hotel

Ground level of the accommodation tower

646 South Pine Road, Eatons Hill QLD 4037

Get Directions

The Night Includes

For you and every guest you bring

◆A drink on arrival
◆Platters of food throughout the night
◆Spot prizes
◆Awards and celebrations
◆A night out with the Knight Fitness community

Want to bring someone?

Your own spot is covered — but if you'd like to bring a partner, friend, or two, simply purchase a ticket for each guest below and add their name in the notes at checkout so we know who's joining you on the night.

Limited spots · First in, first served

Guest tickets close Friday 11 July — get in early.

Purchase a Guest Ticket

Guest spots are only confirmed once a ticket has been purchased.

◆

Dress to impress — think elegance and red carpet.

You've earned this moment — show off your hard work and shine.

See you there,

The Knight Fitness Team

Knight Fitness • 6 Week Challenge Red Carpet Event
Saturday 18 July 2026 • Eatons Hill Hotel, QLD
